understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to place selectable pieces onto the '+' goal tiles. In the last level, there were two selectable pieces and two goal tiles, and I needed to occupy both goals simultaneously to win.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Clicking a position selects the piece at that coordinate or moves the currently selected piece there. Moving with arrow keys shifts the selected piece in that direction. Walls and other pieces block movement, but pushing other pieces is possible if the path is clear.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to place selectable pieces onto the '+' goal tiles. In the last level, there were two selectable pieces and two goal tiles, and I needed to occupy both goals simultaneously to win.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Clicking a position selects the piece at that coordinate or moves the currently selected piece there. Moving with arrow keys shifts the selected piece in that direction. Walls and other pieces block movement, but pushing other pieces is possible if the path is clear.
